source.notes: All downloaded rune art is reference-only and not shipping-safe production art.

entries.name: El
entries.summary: El is a common rune in Diablo II. It is needed in eight Rune Words.

socketBonuses.weapon: +50 to Attack Rating, +1 to Light Radius

trivia: El is the Swedish word for electricity.

availability.note: D2 rune reference only; runes, runewords, and socketing are not implemented in the Rouge runtime.

entries.name: Eld
entries.summary:
Eld is a common rune in Diablo II. Three El runes are needed to create one Eld through the Horadric Cube.
Eld is needed in six Rune Words.

socketBonuses.weapon: +75% Damage to Undead, +50 Attack Rating Against Undead

trivia: Eld is the Swedish word for fire.

availability.note: D2 rune reference only; runes, runewords, and socketing are not implemented in the Rouge runtime.

entries.name: Shael
entries.summary:
Shael is a rune in Diablo II. Shae was the original name of the rune, Blizzard renamed it to Shael at patch 1.09. Three Sol runes and one Chipped Sapphire are needed to create one Shael through the Horadric Cube.
Shael is needed in nine Rune Words.
trivia: Prior to Patch 1.09, Shael Runes were called Shae.

availability.note: D2 rune reference only; runes, runewords, and socketing are not implemented in the Rouge runtime.

entries.name: Hel
entries.summary:
Hel is a rune in Diablo II. Three Dol runes and one Chipped Emerald are needed to create one Hel through the Horadric Cube (this does not work on regular Battle.net). Hel is the only rune that does not have a level requirement.
Hel is needed in eight Rune Words.

cubeUpgradeRecipe.note: this does not work on regular Battle.net

trivia: Hel is the name of the ruler of the Underworld in Norse mythology

availability.note: D2 rune reference only; runes, runewords, and socketing are not implemented in the Rouge runtime.

entries.name: Zod
entries.summary:
Zod is the rarest rune in Diablo II. It can only be obtained in Hell difficulty, from Baal, Diablo, Hephasto the Armorer, Hell Bovines, Nihlathak, unique monsters or ranged minions or wraith-class minions in areas of level 78 or higher, champion monsters or melee minions in areas of level 79 or higher, regular ranged or wraith-class monsters in areas of level 81 or higher, or regular melee monsters in areas in areas of level 82 or higher. Two Cham runes and one Flawless Emerald are needed to create one Zod through the Horadric Cube (this does not work on regular Battle.net).
Zod is only required for one Rune Word.

cubeUpgradeRecipe.note: this does not work on regular Battle.net

availability.note: D2 rune reference only; runes, runewords, and socketing are not implemented in the Rouge runtime.
